hero.headline: We engineer expeditions for the uncompromising traveler.
hero.subtitle: Select your South Island sectors. Swap alpine heli-skiing for deep-water charters. Our real-time logistics engine maps rotor-minutes, local weather channels, and guide manifests instantly.

mission.headline: Your time is the only finite resource. We engineer the experiences that honor it.
mission.bodyText: We have replaced the legacy week-long travel consultation with a real-time logical compiler. By cross-referencing helicopter flight envelopes, private high-country station boundaries, and certified guide availability in milliseconds, we deliver fully validated, zero-delay expedition itineraries before other agencies return a call.

engine.headline: Dynamic Logistics. Instant Feasibility.
engine.description: Bypass the weeks of back-and-forth planning. Drag, drop, and swap modules to match your exact physical ambition. Our proprietary engine compiles and verifies your selections in milliseconds, checking rotor hours, weather history, and guide availability.
engine.validationMessage: ✓ Systems Compiled. Flight windows clear. Guide credentials validated.

title: Fiordland Isolation
description: Absolute isolation in New Zealand's deepest, most impenetrable wilderness. Access restricted sectors via private turbine helicopter, navigate glacial rapids by single-person packraft, and retire to an off-grid high-country lodge accessible only by air.

title: Alpine Adrenaline
description: High-altitude operations designed for alpine enthusiasts. Drop into 800,000 acres of unrestricted Southern Alps powder, rope up with IFMGA-certified guides on the Tasman Glacier, and fly directly to the Harris Saddle to traverse the Routeburn's most technical high pass.

title: Active Restoration
description: Elite performance requires deep physical resetting. Fly-cast for wild trophy trout in inaccessible, crystal-clear glacial streams, cycle premium electric mountain bikes through private Gibbston Valley cellar doors, and reset at a private canyon-edge thermal sanctuary.
imageCaption: Gibbston Valley // Private Cellar Library Reserve

modules.label: Shotover Canyon Private Thermal Onsen & Spa
